name: Trend Exploration, Inc.
summary: Trend Exploration, Inc engages in the supply of products for medical, dental, and veterinary communities. It offers acrylics, alloys, anesthetics, articulating products, burs and diamonds, cements, core materials, cosmetics, crowns, dentures, disposables, endodontics, evacuation products, filling products, finishing materials, infection control products, instruments, lab supplies, medicaments, orthodontics, pins and posts, preventive dentistry products, prophy products, retraction products, rubber dams, handpieces, surgical products, and X-ray products. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Jericho, New York.
